title: That's a good idea — новые слова

items.example: Do you know anyone who runs their own company?
My boss is in charge of the whole marketing department.
When did you last go for a job interview?
More than a hundred people had to compete for a single job.
Which jobs earn a high salary?
If you arrive late every day, you might get fired.
How long have you been out of work?
Many businesses fail in their first year.
We need to make a decision about the name.
Try to come up with as many ideas as possible.
